texto: There is, of course, a deep irony in the fact that technology, which was supposed to cut the ties between people and places and allow people everywhere to work from almost anywhere, turns out to flourish in fairly compact geographic locations.
explicacao: Citação de Bruce Katz sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “There is, of course, a deep irony in the fact that technology, which was supposed to cut the ties…” articula trabalho, cities, innovation em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e innovation.
